subcodes.first_line: He is the Everlasting. Verily this exalted leaf hearkened to the Call of the Tree beyond which there is no passing and winged her flight towards it. 1299
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الباقی ان الورقة العلیا سمعت ندآء سدرة المنتهی و طارت الیها ١۲٩٩
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
